title: Unbreakable Crafting
description: A datapack that adds recipes for crafting unbreakable items.
body:
![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Lm1hHWk0/images/6f421f76d56455bb720fa197049ad5c9f9867519.png)

A datapack that allows crafting `Unbreakable` items. Works with any item that uses durability, including Wolf Armor. Simply craft by combining an Enchanted Golden Apple with any item that uses durability in a Smithing Table. The magic power of the Enchanted Golden Apple is transferred to the item to make it unbreakable.
